windows.description: Overhead BW-920 wax bag and white pellets in a pan beside a metal pillar mould.

windows.video_title: How to Make Pillar Candles // CandleScience Tutorials
windows.description: Wax pellets portioned; an 'LX 26' wick shown; host intercut.
windows.description_detailed: Wax pellets portioned; an 'LX 26' wick shown; host intercut. prep phase, ~25% in, 0:32–0:40.

windows.video_title: How to Make Pillar Candles // CandleScience Tutorials
windows.description: Hands handle the metal pillar mould; caption 'the bottom of the mould becomes the top of the candle'.
windows.description_detailed: Hands handle the metal pillar mould; caption 'the bottom of the mould becomes the top of the candle'. prep phase, ~31% in, 0:40–0:48. Terminology: pillar candle.

windows.video_title: How to Make Pillar Candles // CandleScience Tutorials
windows.description: The wick is threaded through the base hole of the pillar mould.
windows.description_detailed: The wick is threaded through the base hole of the pillar mould. prep phase, ~38% in, 0:48–0:56. Terminology: pillar candle.

windows.video_title: How to Make Pillar Candles // CandleScience Tutorials
windows.description: The mould base is sealed around the wick with putty.
windows.description_detailed: The mould base is sealed around the wick with putty. prep phase, ~44% in, 0:56–1:05. Terminology: sinkhole.

windows.video_title: How to Make Pillar Candles // CandleScience Tutorials
windows.description: Hands continue sealing the wick hole and securing the mould.
windows.description_detailed: Hands continue sealing the wick hole and securing the mould. prep phase, ~50% in, 1:05–1:13.

windows.video_title: How to Make Pillar Candles // CandleScience Tutorials
windows.description: Pillar mould stood upright; caption 'tip: use play-doh or putty'.
windows.description_detailed: Pillar mould stood upright; caption 'tip: use play-doh or putty'. prep phase, ~56% in, 1:13–1:21. Terminology: pillar candle.

windows.video_title: How to Make Pillar Candles // CandleScience Tutorials
windows.description: Molten wax poured into the metal pillar mould.

windows.description: Filled mould left to set; host intercut.
windows.description_detailed: Filled mould left to set; host intercut. assemble phase, ~69% in, 1:29–1:37.

windows.video_title: How to Make Pillar Candles // CandleScience Tutorials
windows.description: Host talks, then the pillar candle is released from the mould.
windows.description_detailed: Host talks, then the pillar candle is released from the mould. Final touches - labels, lids, ribbon, cleaning the glass. finish phase, ~75% in, 1:37–1:45.

windows.description: Finished pillar candles in several colours lined up; wick trimmed.
